title: GPU MODE IRL 2024 Keynotes
description:
The server met IRL for the first time in the beautiful Accel office https://t.co/hq24uIE0fG

Since then we've rebranded to GPU MODE to be more inclusive of different hardware vendors and programming languages discord.gg/gpumode

We were lucky to invite some pretty cracked speakers
00:00 Tri Dao
16:49 Supriya Rao
30:50 Andrej Karpathy
54:06 Lily Liu
1:14:50 Tim Dettmers
1:28:46 Wen-mei Hwu

Slides available: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Pz607n07u382_ybdd4gFdrNyEWra5kpj?usp=sharing

Accel has also added a nice playlist where you can just watch individual speakers https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLV3CP0t7OVdq-FwBTwn2Vm0-JgRR3fbko
